title: koeleria cristata subsp. brevifolia
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. brevifolia, also known as the slender hair grass or Koeleria brevifolia, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata subsp. brevifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea, or made into a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
